name: Amplitude Cohort
description: Schema for an Amplitude behavioral cohort representing a group of users defined by shared behavioral patterns or properties.

id.description: The unique identifier for the cohort.

description.description: A description of the cohort and the behavioral pattern it captures.

size.description: The number of users currently in the cohort.

lastComputed.description: The date and time the cohort membership was last computed.

archived.description: Whether the cohort has been archived.

owner.description: The email address of the cohort owner.

appId.description: The Amplitude project ID the cohort belongs to.

CohortDefinition.name: CohortDefinition
CohortDefinition.description: The behavioral definition that determines cohort membership.

events.description: Array of event conditions that define behavioral cohort membership.

properties.description: Array of user property conditions for property-based cohorts.

EventCondition.name: EventCondition
EventCondition.description: A condition based on user event behavior.

event_type.description: The event type the condition evaluates.

PropertyCondition.name: PropertyCondition
PropertyCondition.description: A condition based on user properties.
